subject: [DMAAP] remove field undefined in in statefulset specification
commit_message:

Patch Set 1:

For the secret part, wouldn't this be an issue when registry does require login/passwd?
Patch Set 2: Published edit on patch set 1.

Patch Set 2:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 6 on the queue.

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> For the secret part, wouldn't this be an issue when registry does require login/passwd?

I've checked and imagePullSecrets should be defined in pod specification.
